name: Basil Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and discard excess fat from the pork chops.
2. In a large frying pan, brown the chops without added fat.
3. When the chops are browned, add the V-8 Juice, dried basil, salt, and black pepper.
4. Cover tightly and simmer for 40 minutes or until tender. Turn the meat occasionally to ensure even cooking.
5. If necessary, add a few tablespoons of water to prevent burning.
1 Serving: 1 Chop Plus 1 Tablespoon Sauce
Nutritive values per serving: 3 grams carbohydrates; 25 grams protein; 14 grams fat; 240 calories; 0.7 gram fiber; 521 milligrams sodium; 91 milligrams cholesterol
Food Exchange per serving: 3 Medium-Fat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange.
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Substitute unsalted V-8 Juice.
